college_info.college_name: Warangal Institute of Technology Science: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for Warangal Institute of Technology Science admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is Warangal Institute of Technology Science a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Warangal Institute of Technology Science is a well-known institution for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Warangal Institute of Technology Science has a rating of 3.3 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 3 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: How can I get into Warangal Institute of Technology Science for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Warangal Institute of Technology Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have completed B.E. /B.Tech./AMIE in Mechanical Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Mechanical engineering (Machatronics), Mechanical engineering (Production Engg), Aeronautical Engineering, Industrial Engg, Production Engg, Industrial Engineering & Production engineering Marine Engineering. (or) equivalent, . Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates. Candidate must have secured 50% marks in group subjects taken together in the qualifying examination (45% for reserved category).
After 10th Diploma Candidate must have passed 10th examination from a recognised board.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Warangal Institute of Technology Science?
faqs.answer: Warangal Institute of Technology Science has been rated 4.3 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: What facilities are there at Warangal Institute of Technology Science in terms of infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Warangal Institute of Technology Science has been rated 3 on Infrastructure parameter.

A:    Warangal Institute of Technology Science offers Degree and Diploma courses including 5 UG and 5 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Warangal Institute of Technology Science has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Structural Engineering, Power Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Warangal Institute of Technology Science?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Warangal Institute of Technology Science is up to 438. Good thing to know is that Warangal Institute of Technology Science has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Warangal Institute of Technology Science for all courses combined?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our college’s environment is very good.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good in our college. 85% of the students were placed in different companies from our college. Nearly 40 plus companies arrive for recruitments including AMAZON, ACCENTURE, WIPRO, HCL and others. The highest package offered is 30 Lacs and the lowest package is 4.5 Lacs.65% of the students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is excellent. We have neat and clean surroundings and environment. There are many facilities at our college. They provide labs and classrooms with clean air. The college provides a hostel facility. The beds are very good in the hostel. Quality of the food in the college hostel is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Every students got placed in companies but without the involvement of college.

review_content.Placements: In fact, our college does not provide any college placements, but they give aptitude training and CRT training so that this helps the students to place in companies. And the majority of the students got placed in good companies but I think this only possible by students true knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides the best central library where each book is helpful for students. And has many events every semester like sports meet and annual day meet which gives enthusiasm to the students.
review_content.Faculty: Well our college is affiliated with Kakatiya University and follows a strict curriculum and syllabus is a bit hard but I think this is a hands-on practice for everyone and majorly each semester has useful core subjects where students can learn topics in an easy manner.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good faculty.

review_content.Placements: Hundreds of students got placed in different companies. The highest package received by a student from the electrical branch was 10 LPA, and the lowest package was 2 LPA in ECE. The top companies that recruit students are Alpha, Amazon, AWS, BHEL, Google, Software Tech etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is the worst. They don't take any initiative. The faculty here are amazing, and they are well qualified. Every lecturer has a Master's in their field.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified, but I think they don't possess good communication skills. In fact, they hold a very good content with them. The curriculum is good. The semester exams are not much difficult for us. We did our best.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am highly satisfied with our college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students got placed. The salary offered is Rs. 35,000-60,000 per month. In our course, the salary offered is Rs. 55,000-70,000 per month. Top recruiting companies of our college are ISRO and DRDO.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college offers 4 courses in diploma and 5 courses in B.Tech, and a total of 5 courses are available in our college. Labs are very good. The infrastructure of our college is good and highest. We have a college hostel, and the food is also very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I really miss this college because I can't talk to my friendly faculty who supported me.

review_content.Placements: Our college has no placements, but to the students who are eligible, capable and talented will have the TASK programme and you can get yourself register and it takes all your career responsibility till you are placed. When you are placed you then don't have to continue the membership. In this college, we don't have a placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: You don't have a Wi-Fi, no proper medical facilities, but during any occasion like annual day we have sports and games. We have the best lab equipment and peaceful atmosphere. We have a canteen which is always closed. The main thing is in rainy season, you have to walk in to the college.

fees_overview.description: Warangal Institute of Technology Science courses are offered to candidates for different course fees. The fee for the courses offered varies between INR 44,700 - 1,80,000. Warangal Institute of Technology Science fees is an amalgamation of various components, such as the hostel fee, tuition fee, and the security deposit. These fee components can either be refundable or non-refundable. Candidates who are shortlisted through the Warangal Institute of Technology Science admission process must pay the course fee to secure their seat.

admission_process.title: Warangal Institute of Technology Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Warangal Institute of Technology Science admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Warangal Institute of Technology Science considers scores in GATE, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET for admission to specific courses.Warangal Institute of Technology Scienceoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,80,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,44,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

cut_off.college_name: Warangal Institute of Technology Science Cutoff 2025: Check TS EAMCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Warangal Institute of Technology Science cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various courses at the UG & PG levels. To check the cutoff details for different exams, rounds and categories, refer to the sections provided below. Candidates can check this page to view the Warangal Institute of Technology Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

Warangal Institute of Technology Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 46724 and 85821 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech specialisations, use

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 46724, 81481 and 85821, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Warangal Institute of Technology Science. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Peddapalli TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 54308 and 88280 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the clo

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 54308, 82813 and 84997, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Peddapalli. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Peddapalli MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 36910. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 40209, and the 2023 cutoff was 49078 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been increasing in the last 3 years.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana comes equipped with a placement cell. The placement cell at Bhaskar Engineering College not only provides placement opportunities but also trains students in skills that enhance their interview performance with various activities, such as a lab for aptitude and technical skills, industry visits and interactive sessions with HR Executives of various partner companies.
faqs.question: Is there a placement cell at Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the courses offered at Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana are all professional courses of various BTech streams, which traditionally have high placement rates. Moreover, students of Bhaskar Engineering College receive training in soft skills as well as various opportunities that prepare them for the job market, such as industry visits and interactive sessions with HR Executives of various partner companies.

At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Bhaskar Engineering College fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,76,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana offers hostel facilities with separate hostel buildings for boys and girls. The hostel intake at Bhaskar Engineering College is 162 and 96 rooms for boys and girls, respectively. reviews_list.review_title: It is a good and decent college with less tution fees and decent faculties with great infrastructur

review_content.Placements: There are not so many good placements in the college. During the covid years it was even more less than usual, after the covid years there were one or two more placements provided from the college. Overall it is below average placements provided from the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Functional labs and neat environment is provided by the college for students. Neat and good benches are provided in the class with good lighting. Overall it is a decent and well above average infrastructure with full of greenery around.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Bhaskar Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: Mostly 50% of students will get placed in our college. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 4lpa. There are many companies like tcs, Wipro, cognizant. Etc.50% of students got internship like Wipro. There are many roles of by our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facili like labs for ever subject and the mess in the cafeteria is good. The College hostel will be good and secured too. Everything in the coll hostel is good. There will sports and games too. There is a Library where we can find many books by which we can improve our knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good faculty members, but it is the worst college.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. There are only 10% chances for placements. In the previous 3 years, only 22 students got placed by the college, but the remaining all students got less percentage.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food served is not good. In this college, from the past four years, three students died due to food poison. The canteen food is somewhat better than hostel food.
review_content.Faculty: Our college has the best faculty members. Some faculty members are the worst. They do not teach the full syllabus. They only teach 60-70% of the syllabus, but they do not teach the full syllabus. Freshers do not join this college because when you study in this college, you do not get a good percentage. It is the worst college, and I suggest you do not join for marks. The course is best, but the college does not teach the college well. If you want to study, then it is best to join other colleges.

review_summary.college_name: Bhaskar Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am impressed because of the good and experienced faculty members. Sports are also encouraged.

content.Placements: 90% of students get placed from our college. The highest package is 20 LPA and the lowest package is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Amazon, TCS, HCL, etc. Almost 95% of students got internships from our course in companies like Tata Consultancy Services, HCL, etc. The top roles offered are software engineer, network engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities of our college are amazing. Our college provides the best infrastructure. It has a very green and healthy environment. Classrooms are very neat. Wi-Fi service is also available. Labs are based on top technologies. The hostel is nice. It provides very clean and healthy food. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are encouraged by the principal.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good and decent college with less tution fees and decent faculties with great infrastructur

content.Placements: There are not so many good placements in the college. During the covid years it was even more less than usual, after the covid years there were one or two more placements provided from the college. Overall it is below average placements provided from the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Functional labs and neat environment is provided by the college for students. Neat and good benches are provided in the class with good lighting. Overall it is a decent and well above average infrastructure with full of greenery around.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Bhaskar Engineering College.

content.Placements: Mostly 50% of students will get placed in our college. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 4lpa. There are many companies like tcs, Wipro, cognizant. Etc.50% of students got internship like Wipro. There are many roles of by our college.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facili like labs for ever subject and the mess in the cafeteria is good. The College hostel will be good and secured too. Everything in the coll hostel is good. There will sports and games too. There is a Library where we can find many books by which we can improve our knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It provides good faculty members, but it is the worst college.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. There are only 10% chances for placements. In the previous 3 years, only 22 students got placed by the college, but the remaining all students got less percentage.
content.Infrastructure: The food served is not good. In this college, from the past four years, three students died due to food poison. The canteen food is somewhat better than hostel food.
content.Faculty: Our college has the best faculty members. Some faculty members are the worst. They do not teach the full syllabus. They only teach 60-70% of the syllabus, but they do not teach the full syllabus. Freshers do not join this college because when you study in this college, you do not get a good percentage. It is the worst college, and I suggest you do not join for marks. The course is best, but the college does not teach the college well. If you want to study, then it is best to join other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: College faculty and campus placements all in all are good can expect some good performances.

content.Placements: There is less number of students get placed in our college the highest salary is 8 Lacs per annum and average salary is about 4 Lacs some students offered as engineer trainee and some are support developers some got internship in top companies as I got internship in lanco which is a civil based company.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure good classrooms and labs and library was very spacious we can get all subjects books and comics and history books a lot collection Wi-Fi also available in library and every classrooms hostel environment was quite good food quality is even better and almost 5 canteens are in the campus can get any food items we want.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana?
faqs.answer: Yes,but under certain conditions. Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana has70%of its seat intake for all its courses managed by theTelangana State Council of Higher Education, which assigns seats based on the results of theTS EAMCET. However, Bhaskar College has full control over the allocation of30%of the remaining seats, Candidates who apply for these seats will have aseparate merit listgenerated.

faqs.question: What all documents are required during Bhaskar Engineering College Telangana admission?
faqs.answer: During admission to Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana, a candidate should have the following documents on hand:1.Pass Certificate and marksheet of 10+12 or equivalent examinations.2.Marksheet of last examination passed (Class 12).3.Attested copy of Scheduled Tribe certificate.4.Transfer Certificate.5.Recent passport-size photograph of Candidate.6.Aadhaar Card.7.TS EAMCET hall ticket and rank card.8.Receipt form from TS online /AP online/credit card/debit card.

faqs.question: What is the application process for admission to Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana?
faqs.answer: To apply for admission to Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana, candidates can follow the steps below:Step 1: Apply forTS EAMCET 2025on theJNTU Hyderabadofficial website.Step 2: Appear forTS EAMCET.Step 3: Log in to the official college website (bec.edu.in).Step 4: Fill in the necessary details on the Admissions pop-up.Step 5: Choose preferred course.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for Bhaskar Engineering College Telangana admission?
faqs.answer: The application dates for Bhaskar Engineering College in Telangana depend on the TS EAMCET, which determines admission for70%of seats at Bhaskar College. For the academic year2025, application forms were released onMarch 1,  2025. Applicants who submitted their forms afterApril 4,  2025, were required to paylate fees, and thelast datefor submission wasApril 18,  2025. Candidates must also submit their details and preferred courses, if applicable, on the official college website to apply for direct admission.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: ARM College of Engineering and Technology is the overall best college.

content.Placements: The ARM College of Engineering and Technology is more reputed for placements. In the 2021 mechanical department, 100 percent of students were placed. This college's placement training staff gives more training to all students. Salary packages are 2.5 LPA–12 LPA. All the students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good classroom facilities. More computer laboratories with internet facilities are also available. A well-equipped library is also here at this college. Separate hostels for boys and girls. Food quality is good. Cricket field facilities are also available at this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with our college.

content.Placements: There are no campus placements in our college. In 2019, only one company came to campus for the mechanical department. In our department, many students were placed before 2018. Even though we are going to complete our graduation, we didn't hear about any campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are fine. Many kits and computers are not working in the laboratory. You can't even take the output from it. The food in the mess is fine and there is no canteen. They held a sports day in 2019.
content.Faculty: In our department, staff members are very friendly and knowledgeable about teaching you, but the teaching in other departments is not good. They only read the paragraphs and tell you that it's over. They don't ask you if it's understandable.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with staffs and good management support for students and their future.

content.Placements: 1. In our batch 75% of students were placed in our course and few of the students got Engineering business from sponsors. Many were placed in UCAL fuel systems and some of them got permanent jobs in supervising grades. It was a good experiencing job including me. 2. The salary offered from the different companies are 35 k the highest, 12 k the lowest and average is 19 k for monthly basis apart from food and other allowances. 3. Top recruiting companies for our college are FORD, NISSAN, UCAL FUEL SYSTEMS, FAURECIA, COMSTAR and B-BRAUN 4. Top roles such as supervising roles, 2nd grade in quality checker and 1st grade in the production department. 5. In our course the highest paid package was 420000, the lowest paid package was 144000 and the average package was 228000 for annual packages. 6. The students who got internship from our course were 70% students and from FORD, NISSAN, UCAL, EUREKA etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with staff, good placements in 2018 managements, infrastructure.

content.Placements: 1.80% of students got placed 2.40 k is the highest Salary offered and 25 k is the lowest Salary offered and 15 k is the average salary offered 3. Ford, Nissan, UCAL fuel Systems are the top recruiting companies. 4. Supervisor, Asst Manager are the top roles. 5.6 Lacs is the highest package offered, 4 Lacs is the lowest package offered and 2 Lacs is average package offered 6.70% of students got internship from mechanical engineering in UCAL Fuel Management Systems.
content.Infrastructure: 1. Wi-Fi facility is available and very good network and fast server, Labs are super good, Classrooms are neat, Library available. 2. Hostel Facility is very good, ventilation is also good and canteen food was very hygienic and tasty. Sports Day will be conducted in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is waste of money and time. Good faculty with overwhelmingly and poor management.

content.Placements: The placements offered are not good, but each year the management has been hiring more companies. There is separate placement officer for the college, so he keeps track of hiring more companies. Last year, the placements offered was good compared to the previous year. The company Zoho visited last year and conducted the interview in which no one has been selected. Other companies visited and hired some students. Afterall it's your skills which wins you many interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The college is not in the main area but located in a rural area. The management provides bus services from the station to the college. It usually takes 15 mins to reach the college from the boarding point. The Wi-Fi facility is available, but only for the staff members. But you can hack them anyways. The canteen is available with below average amenities and food. The hostel rooms are not great they allot like 5 members in a single room. Pray for the roommates coming with you.

paragraphs: ARM College of Engineering and Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and Business and Management Studies.ARM College of Engineering and Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, CEETA, and TANCET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 35,000 - 2,00,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

reviews.review_heading: ARM College of Engineering and Technology is the overall best college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good classroom facilities. More computer laboratories with internet facilities are also available. A well-equipped library is also here at this college. Separate hostels for boys and girls. Food quality is good. Cricket field facilities are also available at this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fine. Many kits and computers are not working in the laboratory. You can't even take the output from it. The food in the mess is fine and there is no canteen. They held a sports day in 2019.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with staffs and good management support for students and their future.
reviews.review_text: 1. It is fully surrounded with the concrete wall with beautiful and essential plants, where it is not seen in the city side. The restrooms are neat and dormitory is available. The department for courses are different in blocks so that the students can explore the lab, seminar halls wisely. The Wi-Fi- campus is very useful for us to search and research for projects. The library facilities are available during the entire period of time with various essential books, articles, novels, newspapers, et...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with staff, good placements in 2018 managements, infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
1. Wi-Fi facility is available and very good network and fast server, Labs are super good, Classrooms are neat, Library available.
2. Hostel Facility is very good, ventilation is also good and canteen food was very hygienic and tasty. Sports Day will be conducted in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is waste of money and time. Good faculty with overwhelmingly and poor management.
reviews.review_text: The college is not in the main area but located in a rural area. The management provides bus services from the station to the college. It usually takes 15 mins to reach the college from the boarding point. The Wi-Fi facility is available, but only for the staff members. But you can hack them anyways. The canteen is available with below average amenities and food. The hostel rooms are not great they allot like 5 members in a single room. Pray for the roommates coming with you.

reviews.review_heading: An average college. Average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the campus. Many books are not available in the library. The medical facilities are poor. Sports facilities are average. The labs and classrooms need maintenance. The food is not so good but the canteen is fine. The hostel facility is not too bad. There are no issues about the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: ARM College review. Please don't join this college.
reviews.review_text: We were the second batch of the college and there was no proper infrastructure. Even now, the college doesn't have a good infrastructure. No proper lab setup or even classrooms. No sports facilities. The hostel rooms not good. Even transportation is pathetic and it is almost 4 km inside the city.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ARM College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The strength of the mobile signal is weak in our college because our college is surrounded by lakes. Our college has a natural environment. We have a small canteen. Food is served on time. The food served in the canteen is average.

faqs.answer: Sivaji College of Engineering and Technology has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. Sivaji College of Engineering and Technology offers specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Agriculture & Farm Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Construction Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Sivaji College of Engineering and Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: Sivaji College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E/B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engg. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with faculty members, good facilities, and the quality of education.

review_content.Placements: We have a placement cell in our college. From our faculty members, we get the best advice for placements and internships. Many of our seniors got placed at different companies and they are now in good positions. As for our request, internship updates are also given to us.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything in our college is good. There are neat and well-maintained canteens, a library, big classrooms, labs, etc. The washrooms are not good. Classrooms are huge, ventilated, and sufficient. Fans are also there, and the benches are also good. Huge labs are separately located on different floors. The labs include computer and electrical engineering labs, a physics lab, a chemistry lab, and a civil workshop lab.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied depending on that what they provide, this college is a good choice.

review_content.Placements: Around 65% of students got placed in our course, and the highest salary package offered in our college is ECE and the average is for IT, and the lowest is for CSE. The top recruiting companies for our course will be Infosys, Accenture, Google, Amazon, etc. Very less hand full students got internships right now. The top roles offered in my course are testing engineer, software engineer, data analytic, web developer, and more.

fee_structure.heading: Shadan Women's College of Engineering and Technology Courses & Fees 2025
fee_structure.overview: The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

faqs.answer: Shadan Women's College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in ECE/AMIE in ECE, AMIE (Electronics and Telecommunication Engg)./AMIETE (Electronics & Telematics Engg.)/ Electronics or equivalent / Electronics from a UGC recognised University/ Institute. M.Sc. (Electronics) is not eligible to apply. Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates. Candidate must have secured 50% marks in group subjects taken together in the qualifying examination (45% for reserved category).B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2003). No maximum age limit.

overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Shadan Women's College of Engineering and Technology are M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Shadan Women's College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Placements don't happen much in our college. For the past few years, there have been less than none, but our faculty members help us in learning technologies for getting a job. They always guide us with resources that are very useful for us to apply for any job.
content.Infrastructure: We have very good facilities in our college like Wi-Fi and fully equipped laboratories. The library has every book that is needed for us during our course. We also have a canteen, which serves hygienic food at low cost. We have medical facilities like first aid too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Positive environment and gives confidence to speak.

content.Placements: A few students were placed in from my course and the roles offered was of campus executive by the Intershala offering paid internship. We are also receiving mails from many companies regrading internship and online certified placement courses are offered to develop our skills.
content.Infrastructure: During my first year the infrastructure was bad their after covid, there were many improvements and canteen food is also good and in mess we can customize our food as per taste and the green area is created recently including the area for badminton basketball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with faculty members, good facilities, and the quality of education.

content.Placements: We have a placement cell in our college. From our faculty members, we get the best advice for placements and internships. Many of our seniors got placed at different companies and they are now in good positions. As for our request, internship updates are also given to us.
content.Infrastructure: Everything in our college is good. There are neat and well-maintained canteens, a library, big classrooms, labs, etc. The washrooms are not good. Classrooms are huge, ventilated, and sufficient. Fans are also there, and the benches are also good. Huge labs are separately located on different floors. The labs include computer and electrical engineering labs, a physics lab, a chemistry lab, and a civil workshop lab.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied depending on that what they provide, this college is a good choice.

content.Placements: Around 65% of students got placed in our course, and the highest salary package offered in our college is ECE and the average is for IT, and the lowest is for CSE. The top recruiting companies for our course will be Infosys, Accenture, Google, Amazon, etc. Very less hand full students got internships right now. The top roles offered in my course are testing engineer, software engineer, data analytic, web developer, and more.
content.Infrastructure: Here in Shadan we have labs, but there are a few systems that don't work causing a problem for students. The classroom and infrastructure are overall good. We have a canteen, the food is tasty, and sports are scheduled for first-year students only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: There are no placements in this college and also the infrastructure is poor.

content.Placements: There are no placements in this college. So students have to work hard to find a job or an internship. But there are lecturers who are always ready to guide the students. There are limited number of courses offered. A few of our seniors were able to bag good roles in the working industry through their consistent efforts.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides spacious classrooms, a library, and various labs for different subjects. The labs are well-equipped but the computer labs are the worst. Being a computer science student, it's devastating to look at the labs. The Wi-Fi network is only for the lab and it cannot be accessed by students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shadan Women's College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: We have very good facilities in our college like Wi-Fi and fully equipped laboratories. The library has every book that is needed for us during our course. We also have a canteen, which serves hygienic food at low cost. We have medical facilities like first aid too.

reviews.review_heading: Positive environment and gives confidence to speak.
reviews.review_text: During my first year the infrastructure was bad their after covid, there were many improvements and canteen food is also good and in mess we can customize our food as per taste and the green area is created recently including the area for badminton basketball.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, good facilities, and the quality of education.
reviews.review_text: Everything in our college is good. There are neat and well-maintained canteens, a library, big classrooms, labs, etc. The washrooms are not good. Classrooms are huge, ventilated, and sufficient. Fans are also there, and the benches are also good. Huge labs are separately located on different floors. The labs include computer and electrical engineering labs, a physics lab, a chemistry lab, and a civil workshop lab.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied depending on that what they provide, this college is a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Here in Shadan we have labs, but there are a few systems that don't work causing a problem for students. The classroom and infrastructure are overall good. We have a canteen, the food is tasty, and sports are scheduled for first-year students only.

reviews.review_heading: There are no placements in this college and also the infrastructure is poor.
reviews.review_text: The college provides spacious classrooms, a library, and various labs for different subjects. The labs are well-equipped but the computer labs are the worst. Being a computer science student, it's devastating to look at the labs. The Wi-Fi network is only for the lab and it cannot be accessed by students.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not satisfied as the college doesn't provide placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but not for all, only for faculty members. In labs, only 50% of the computers work well. I don't live in the hostel, but I guess the hostels I know are good around me. We've a canteen, and the food here is tasty. We have almost everything, like icecreams, juices, fast food etc.

reviews.review_heading: It's an average college. Not so good .
reviews.review_text: The canteen food is good and hygienic. The classrooms are average. They should improve the toilets they are too unhygienic. The computer lab software isn't up to date. But the electrical lab has all the necessary equipments. The library has all the books required for our course available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissapointed by the end of final year.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. We have good benches and spacious classrooms. The washrooms need to be maintained. We have a good collection of books in the library. The canteen does provide varieties of food like breakfasts and snacks, fresh juices and fresh fruits.

reviews.review_heading: The good and the bad aspects of Shadan.
reviews.review_text: The college is totally equipped with great Wi-Fi and infrastructure. This makes the campus easily accessible for all the students. The canteen is clean and hygienic providing good food for the students. The labs are great and the students are encouraged to take time in solving their queries.

reviews.review_heading: It has good teachers but lacks in infrastructure and overall development of students' skills.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not much good. The campus just has one 10-storeyed building and a canteen in front of it. There is no playground. However, labs, classrooms and libraries are well structured and are in good condition. Medical facilities are not provided, and sports and games are also not provided.

college_info.intro:
JBIET Hyderabad courses include plenty of diverse selections for students from various academic backgrounds. The flagship programmes include the Bachelor of Technology (BTech) and Master of Business Administration (MBA). These courses are the most in-demand with students, as they provide solid foundations for Engineering or Management fields, respectively.
The JBIET BTech course is offered in various specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering (CSE), Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), among others. Students can choose their desired specialisations as per their respective career aspirations.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college faculty members and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Above 50- 80% of our students will be placed on campus placements. The highest package in our college is 6 LPA. The average package in our college is 4 LPA. Our college doesn't provide any internships for students. Our college doesn't invite many companies like Wipro and Infosys for campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very well-equipped classrooms and labs. We have digital classrooms and library. Our labs have high internet connectivity. Our college infrastructure is very good. We have separate hostel blocks for boys and girls. Boys hostel can accommodate over 500 students. Girls hostel block can accommodate over 300 students. The food is very hygienic. We have a seperate sports club in our college. We have all the facilities in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with placements and infrastructure but completely dissatisfied with the faculty.

review_content.Placements: In our college, 50% of students got placed and most of them are in customer service. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. Deltax, HCL, Collabera, Linux, and some more are recruiting companies. In our college, there is no importance for internships. Artificial intelligence, data science, artificial intelligence and machines learning, CSE are top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library is the best part of our college, it consists of maximum useful books. Hostel also provides good enough security, storage, and good food. It provides 24-hour security for ladies, attached gym, playground, and library. Canteen is shut down most of the time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The experience I had at my college.

content.Placements: 20 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 8 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ZeroCode HR, Sutherland, HCL, Excel, Advi Technologies, and Skill Intern. Nobody got internships from our college. They are selected by an outside company through an application. The roles offered in our course are AI engineer and ML developer.
content.Infrastructure: The facility of classroom is good. But the Wi-Fi facility is not there. In the labs, there are few working computers. Mostly computers are not working. The facilities in our hostel are 3 MEM per room. Each has bed, beeruva, and study chair. The quality of food in mess is poor. In canteen, food is average.

content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure but there is a problem with Wi-Fi and fans in our classrooms. Library is also very peaceful place to study. faqs.question: How to reach JB Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: JB Institute of Engineering and Technology campus is located at a central location in the city of Hyderabad. Students can arrive at the Rajiv Gandhi International Airport and take a 30-minute drive to reach the institute campus. reviews.review_heading: The college life I expected before coming here is becoming a reality.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for our better future.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are very good in our college. The hostel is good. We have Wi-Fi in our classrooms. We have a great library with a wide range of books. The quality of the food is very good. The hostel provides non-vegetarian food items twice a week.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, but it is losing its reputation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the computer science and engineering course was good. We had a decent computer lab where PCs were in good condition. We didn't have Wi-Fi in the lab. In the boys' hostel, we did not have good hostel facilities. There was no Wi-Fi available on campus. The quality of the food served was not good. The water supply was for only 20 minutes in the morning and evening.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers are well-qualified, experienced and have good skills.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very huge and the campus is green and clean.

Classrooms are very good with digital classes. Our library is very huge. There are many facilities like sports and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's good to study in this institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, as the labs and classrooms are spacious and have all the facilities. Our hostel is very spacious with Wi-Fi connectivity. The food provided is hygienic and tasty, like home food. There is a huge ground on our campus to play.

reviews.review_heading: Our college crowd was very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure was very beautiful and good. All the classrooms were modern, and our college provided very good library facility and Wi-Fi facility. Our college canteen was good and served healthy and fresh food. Quality of food was also very good.

reviews.review_heading: The college had excellent teachers for 2014 to 2018 batch but not for 1st-year students.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are two big cricket grounds and a good basketball court. College interior was good and mainly mechanical, CSE and ECE block was good as compared to other branches blocks. The college hostel is neat, but there is a water problem. Food served is also average. The college canteen was the best to hangout. Everything is available in our college, like food, books, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Compucom Institute of Technology & Management offers a wide range of programmes at UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech and BCA. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Compucom Institute of Technology & Management fee structure ranges between INR 70,000 to 2,69,224.

faqs.answer: A:    Compucom Institute of Technology & Management has courses such as B.Tech, M.J.M.C., BCA, MBA/PGDM, MCA, M.E./M.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Mass Communication & Media, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Compucom Institute of Technology & Management has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Information Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Compucom Institute of Technology & Management?

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: There is a good campus, and you will be made industry-ready.

content.Placements: 63% of students got placed in my college. The highest package is 53 LPA. The lowest is 3 LPA. 78% of students got internships form our college. There are many companies that come like Google, Amazon, Facebook, and Infosys. Last time, five students got internships in Google.
content.Infrastructure: There are facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. They are in very good condition. The quality of the hostel quality and mess and canteen food are good. We can play any games there with our sports teacher.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is good for students.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placement. Almost 90% of students are placed every year. The highest salary package offered for BCA is 5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Amazon, TCS, Infotech, Infosys, etc., visit our campus. The top roles offered are Executive Engineer, Design Engineer, Web Developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. Labs are well-equipped in all departments. Our classrooms are well-furnished. Many books are available in the library. Hostel facilities are available for girls and boys. Indoor and outdoor game facilities are available at the college.

individual_reviews.title: This campus is perfect for new students, who are willing to take admission in B.Tech.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in our Computer Science batch. The lowest salary package offered in my batch is 5 LPA. Recruiting companies are Google, Amazon, Facebook, Meta, etc. The top companies visit our campus. Around 75% of students from our batch got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this campus is excellent. Classrooms are well decorated along with Wi-Fi connection. Every facility is available in our hostel. The quality of the food is excellent and delicious. There are two canteens in our hostel.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty; good placements in 2023 were really good.

content.Infrastructure: The college hostels are very nice; they have Wi-Fi, good food, and a library available for all students. The canteen is also very good, and medical facilities are available on our campus. Sports events are managed every year in our college; this college is the best choice for a bright future.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with college culture and facilities there is no problem for students in this campus.

content.Placements: There are 50 students in our batch in B.Tech Computer Science branch. The highest package is 17 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiters are Infosys, Zordialetc. 80% of students got internships in the course. Software development roles are mostly offered in our course.

There are cultural programs every year. In sports, there is good equipment for students to play games, and modern grounds increase the beauty of games.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 72,000 - 2,69,224. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

reviews.review_text: Our college has all the facilities required for the student's needs. There's a lab in each separate department allotted to a specific field. Those are also too clean. A big library is also here, containing knowledgeable books for students' studies. The building infrastructure is very attractive and good to look at. The quality of food is enough to meet the health requirements of students. The Mess provides different types of food every day. A medical facility is also available, and there is a sp...

reviews.review_heading: Sports facilities are dull in this college and less crowd.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in CITM college. Hostel rooms and classrooms are well-furnished. Food quality is also good. The canteen has a big party space. But all types of fast food are not available in canteen. Indoor games are also not provided in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in the college are average. We have Wi-Fi in the proper amount, and classrooms are proper. The library is good, and the hostel is in good condition. Food facility is just average but overall I will say that it is good for the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good and helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. There are upgraded lab equipment and other facilities like E-library, classrooms, labs, Wi-Fi membership, classroom with projectors, sports facilities, and many more. The campus is spacious, well maintained, and clean. Good quality of college hostel is available with good facilities. Good quality food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities and sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best quality education at the lowest cost.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities available in my department are
1) Wi-Fi facility in labs, classrooms and library
2) CCTV cameras are there in classrooms 
3) Food quality in mess are average and in canteen, it was nice. 
4)There is no health infrastructure in our campus .

reviews.review_heading: It is a college with less restrictions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average, and Wi-Fi facilities are limited on the campus. There are labs for other departments, and CITM offers many courses. Our college is a little bit far from the main city, and the atmosphere around the college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Students of our college have topped in MBA previous year.
reviews.review_text: I am a student living in the hostel in this college itself. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The behaviour of all the staff is good here. The food served here is also good.

Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. reviews.review_text: Good classrooms, nice hostel, games, good quality of food, etc. are available. Mess is very neat and clean. Classroom and library are available. The canteen is a bit small but with  plenty of items.

reviews.review_heading: It is a well-disciplined college that offers better packages and has a green campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college had large computer labs, well-structured classrooms, machine labs, etc. Hostels provide Wi-Fi. We have a disciplined library, which helps us learn things and get good marks.

reviews.review_heading: This college is ragging-free, the hostel is good, but mechanical teachers are not good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and rooms are good. The warden has given security to students but Wi-Fi is not provided. The laboratories are very good. The library is excellent with several books. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of its facilities, but it provides good staff and placements.
reviews.review_text: Students have good facilities in this college. The classrooms are good and neat. The library facilities are also good, and also a good network connection i.e Wi-Fi is enabled. The hostel facility is good, and it provides water and good beds. It has a big canteen and the entire students are visiting this college canteen. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ramireddy Subbarami Reddy Engineering College (RSREC).
reviews.review_text: All the infrastructural facilities like a library, labs and classrooms are available within the campus, which can be helpful in the development of students. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, but our college is helpful in the categorisation of students on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of the environment in this college and its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the worst and old here. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, and the canteen is very small. There are no medical facilities, sports and games. The labs are not updated as per the syllabus, and they are old. The quality of facilities provided in this college is bad.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with management of the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in my college is avarage and the labs are very old and it is not proper working and the hostel facility is the worst, and quality of that food is below average, there is no medical facilities in hostel and no games and sports are not playing in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Nellore.
reviews.review_text: Food and management are good in the mess, and the warden is also good. It has the best power play section for all hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place for economically poor students to complete the B.Tech graduation.
reviews.review_text: There are good labs, classrooms and a library. There is poor Wi-Fi, and the food and water are good. The canteen is also available, and there is a sports ground. Every year our college management conducts a college fest for 5 days, and on that fest day, we enjoyed a lot. It also conducts sports competitions, where students who win get their prizes on the sports day.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely dissatisfied because of the environment and infrastructure in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the worst and old here. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, and the canteen is very small. There are no medical facilities, sports and games. Labs are not updated as per the syllabus and are old. The quality of facilities provided in this college is bad.

faqs.answer:
A:    Shri Shirdi Sai Institute of Science and Engineering (SSSISE) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream of engineering and technology with the above-mentioned minimum percentage (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.

review_content.Placements: About 20% of the students got placed from this course. The highest salary package offered is around 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies here are Synconext Technologies and TCS. Roles offered here are frontend and backend developer, system engineer and android developer. None of the students got an internship as of now.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as labs, etc., are good here. Labs have many systems, and classrooms are spacious. There is a huge library with sufficient books, but Wi-Fi is not provided. The quality of facilities provided is average, and the food served is average. There are no games, no medical facilities and no sports.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

admission_process.title: Prashanti institute of Technology and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Prashanti institute of Technology and Science admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Prashanti institute of Technology and Scienceoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 94,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category). The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates admitted through Lateral Entry in degree courses are not eligible. Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category). The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates admitted through Lateral Entry in degree courses are not eligible. faqs.question: How can I get into R.V.S. Educational Trust's Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
R.V.S. Educational Trust's Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University can also apply.
Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.

review_content.Placements: There weren't any placements offered by our college. Every student gives efforts after completion of their course and gets selected as per their capability. review_content.Faculty: The college is closed permanently from last three years. Earlier teachers were good, and everything was running smoothly. One thing I like about college is that they were providing an expensive course at a very low price. I am thankful to them for this.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an isolated campus, with good infrastructure and poor placements.

review_content.Placements: Core placements were not provided for my course. But some IT companies arranged placement drives on campus in which the students of all branches can apply. They offered packages of about 2-3 Lacs per annum. The number of students placed was very less compared to the strength of college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not bad. Good hostel facilities and an above-average library are available. The canteen is very neat and hygienic, and the food in the canteen is the best. There is a good ground for football and cricket. They usually conduct a football tournament with the nearby colleges every year.
