review_summary.college_name: Columbia Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Placements and T&P cell of the college were good.

content.Placements: Placements in the college were quite good during our tenure. Almost 30% of the students got placed including me. Special thanks to T&P department who gave us several seminars and improved our communication skills by conducting aptitude test, group discussion, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms are spacious, but the benches were not comfortable. Our college has a huge library, and every book was available there. The college doesn't show any interest in sports and games. Quality of food served in the canteen was average. Hostels are very disgusting. If I have to rate the overall infrastructure, I will give it a 2 out of 5.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Overall I will rate the college good not too much but enough for an average student to get exp thing

content.Placements: It has a placement cell which is quite good but to those who don't care won't get placements, the highest package of our batch was around 8lacs p. a who was placed and the lowest went was 25k p. m. but still a lot of students were placed din companies like merchant navy, HCl and more.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is Wi-Fi with good exposure to co curricular activities and a big library along with hostels and a good food facility. It's a group of institutions with Diploma and degree full time courses. Now maybe it has opened a school too to develop the infrastructure. But when we used to study there are very little options to reach on time to college if you miss the college bus as it is a bit on the inner linings of a station named mandhar.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: A review on Columbia Institute of Engineering and Technology, Raipur.

content.Placements: Columbia Institute of Engineering and Technology has good placements. The companies like Bajaj, Idea, Airtel, come to the college for placements. They find brilliant students in our group and offer them good salary packages. Every student will be happy with the facilities in Columbia College.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has free Wi-Fi, football ground, cricket ground, good canteen facilities, grounds, etc. Every facility required by the students is available in our college. We have a seminar hall which is one of the best seminar halls.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Really good team that develops students' future.

content.Placements: There are good placements at our college. Various companies such as Hero, Bajaj, Maruti and banking campus visited the campus for placements. There is a well-coordinated placement department. There is a person responsible for the training and placement department who contacts several companies. At least 20 companies visit each and every year.
content.Infrastructure: There is a well-defined and beautiful building with a good garden. There are suitable lab facilities, and there is also a well-maintained and clean seminar hall that has adequate space. There is a well-defined sitting arrangement in the classrooms. It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus, and there is an excellent computer lab. The faculty members are nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: All About My College in one Breath.

content.Placements: The placement of the Columbia Institute of Engineering and Technology has been good since their first batch. This year's placement record has not been updated yet but if we talk about previous year, the placement was 82%. The salary offers have been different with different years but the average salary has been in the range of 2-4 Lacs per annum. The minimum salary has been 0.9-2 Lacs per annum while the highest till has reached upto 21 Lacs per annum. The list of few companies (includes local as well as national and international brands) from the year 2016-2018 that visited campus and are likely to visit in future are- 1) Tech Mahindra 2) Jain Software 3) JJ PV Solar pvt Ltd. 4) Tele Performance - YAHOO 5) Tele Performance - AMAZON (for US) 6) HDFC Life 7) Dainik Bhaskar 8) Airtel 9) BSNL 10) Global Bridge information Tech 11) Shri Anand Technologies 12) Phoenix Sea Services 13) Bajaj Auto (Vandana Bajaj Raipur) 14) Jaguar-Land Rover (Satyam Balajee Raipur) The roles/positions offered to students are as follows - 1) Technical Support Engineer 2) Customer Support Officer 3) Technical Marine Engineer 4) Marketing Executive 5) Trainee Engineer 6) Marketing Officer 7) Business Development Representative 8) Software Developer 9) ERT Officer 10) US IT Recruiter 11) Campaign Associate 12) Consultant 13) Business Development Executive 14) Trainee Marine Engineer Internships are not as common here in Chhattisgarh as it is outside Chhattisgarh. So it will be hardly 10% of students only (stipend being unknown). The training and placement cell is very effective and helpful working to bring new companies to campus and maintaining bond with the old ones. The head of the cell is in direct contact with students of last year and meets the 3rd year student at regular basis to have a check on their development, skills and knowing them. Special attention is given to above average students for getting the excellent opportunities. From the first year Soft Skill Development classes and Aptitude classes for 2nd & 3rd year are held.

description: Columbia Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 will be released soon for admission to the BE/BTech courses. In the meantime, aspirants seeking admission can check the sections below to view Columbia Group of Institutions cutoff 2024 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories to understand the cutoff trends. A few more updates are given below:

Columbia Group of Institutions CG PET cutoff 2025 has been released for the second round for candidates waiting to get admission to B.E. / B.Tech course. The cutoff list was released category-wise as opening-closing cutoff ranks. The cutoff ranks also varied on the basis of gender, as some reservations were made for Female category students.

CG PET cutoff 2025 is finally out for students seeking admission to various undergraduate engineering courses in the state of Chhattisgarh. Columbia Group of Institutions has also released the second round cutoff list for aspiring candidates, based on JEE Main scores and CG PET counselling. The minimum cutoff for admission to any branch was 1445, for candidates belonging to the General HS category. The maximum required cutoff rank is 3192 during Round 2 admission.

The Directorate of Technical Education (DTE) have announced the CG PET 2025 counselling dates online. CG PET 2025 seat allotment results are being announced separately for the different rounds of counselling. Allotment of seats will be done based on the candidate's obtained rank, preferences, category and seat availability. Candidates can check out the important CGPET 2025 datesc in the table below:

Below are the Columbia Group of Institutions CG PET consolidated PDFs for students interested in seeking admission to the college for B.E. / B.Tech course. Students can view or download the PDFs to view the round and year-wise cutoff lists.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and T&P cell of the college were good.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms are spacious, but the benches were not comfortable. Our college has a huge library, and every book was available there. The college doesn't show any interest in sports and games. Quality of food served in the canteen was average. Hostels are very disgusting. If I have to rate the overall infrastructure, I will give it a 2 out of 5.

reviews.review_heading: Overall I will rate the college good not too much but enough for an average student to get exp thing
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi with good exposure to co curricular activities and a big library along with hostels and a good food facility. It's a group of institutions with Diploma and degree full time courses. Now maybe it has opened a school too to develop the infrastructure. But when we used to study there are very little options to reach on time to college if you miss the college bus as it is a bit on the inner linings of a station named mandhar.

reviews.review_heading: A review on Columbia Institute of Engineering and Technology, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: Our college has free Wi-Fi, football ground, cricket ground, good canteen facilities, grounds, etc. Every facility required by the students is available in our college. We have a seminar hall which is one of the best seminar halls.

reviews.review_heading: Really good team that develops students' future.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-defined and beautiful building with a good garden. There are suitable lab facilities, and there is also a well-maintained and clean seminar hall that has adequate space. There is a well-defined sitting arrangement in the classrooms. It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus, and there is an excellent computer lab. The faculty members are nice.

reviews.review_heading: All About My College in one Breath.
reviews.review_text: The campus of Columbia Group of Institutions is vast nearly equal to NIT Raipur's campus. Though a larger part is not used, the rest is covered by Columbia Global School, Colombia College of Nursing, Columbia College of Pharmacy, Columbia Institute of Engineering and Technology and Colombia College of B. Eed. The facilities includes pharmacy/medical, parking, big canteen, library, seminar hall, labs, small auditorium and green surroundings. The classrooms are normal classic style with desk, benc...

reviews.review_heading: Columbia Group of Institutions is a medium college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The classrooms are good. The labs are too good. The most important goodness of our college is that the canteen is too big and the quality of food is much better in low price, and the area of enjoyment is also better.

It has a nice infra structure and will maintained lab for every stream in BE. I have just pass through this college and also qualified GATE 2015 with 38.35 marks without any couching. I have got help through faculty. It has nice environment to study well and maintained hostel and bus facility. It has a nice infra structure and will maintained lab for every stream in BE. I have just pass through this college and also qualified GATE 2015 with 38.35 marks without any couching. I have got help through faculty. It has nice environment to study well and maintained hostel and bus facility.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good with excellent facilities. Our campus atmosphere is perfect and we can study peacefully. It also has high-speed internet. Smart classes are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good campus and environment.
reviews.review_text: For our course, many good facilities are available in the college. Wi-Fi labs are available, and classrooms are eco-friendly and spacious. The facility of the hostel was good with special rooms and a well-managed mess for food. And also it has a well maintained canteen for students and also for visitors and teacher staff.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and faculty members are the best for students.
reviews.review_text: All tools and machinery goods are available for mechanical engineering, and there is a good canteen for lunch. The best part of our college is its library which is very good for students. The hostel is good, and there are no rules and regulations. Medical facilities are available in our college in pharmacy.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very popular in the state, and faculty members are very qualified.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very beautiful. Moreover, the infrastructure of our course and hostel is also very beautiful. The canteen facility is also very good. Both in our college and hostel, Wi-Fi facilities are available. Lab facilities are very good here, and every lab has glassware. Instruments are available.

reviews.review_heading: Teacher are not experienced and no placement.
reviews.review_text:
Hostel rooms are very well clean.
The washroom is well clean all time.
Food quality is good.
Medical facilities are provided
Food is available in this college canteen.
No football ground this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: For obtaining degree this is a very good college but for the placements and knowledge it is not.

review_content.Placements: No companies come here for the placement. If you want to find a job after BCA, then you are at a wrong place. There are no proper summer training arrangements and no placements. Before few year some companies used to come for the placement. But, nowadays no companies come for recruitment. There is a placement cell, but it is only for the sake of the name. Taking admission into this college can prove to be your biggest mistake of life. So if you want to study only for the degree, this is a good college, but for the placement, it is not.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is good for low budget students as well as looking for scholarship opportunity.

review_content.Placements: Percentage of placement is very less like 2/40. Some paid and some unpaid internships are offered. No big companies or MNCs are represented in this college. The startup company's approach is good, and they took some students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is fine and available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, conference hall, playground, park, etc. There is a hostel but none of the students stay there and take a PG or room near the college. Canteen is there. Medical facilities are there. Sports and games can be played on the ground attached to the college.

review_summary.college_name: Technical Education and Research Institute (TERI, Ghazipur) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college facilities are good.

content.Placements: In our college, a minimum number of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA and the average salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Infosys, Mahindra, Jio and UBI visited our campus. Almost 55% of students got internships at Infosys and Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were very good. The college had state-of-the-art infrastructure, with campus Wi-Fi, upgraded laboratories, digital classrooms, and deluxe hostels. The college is located in a serene environment with wonderful scenery. It also had excellent sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: For obtaining degree this is a very good college but for the placements and knowledge it is not.

content.Placements: No companies come here for the placement. If you want to find a job after BCA, then you are at a wrong place. There are no proper summer training arrangements and no placements. Before few year some companies used to come for the placement. But, nowadays no companies come for recruitment. There is a placement cell, but it is only for the sake of the name. Taking admission into this college can prove to be your biggest mistake of life. So if you want to study only for the degree, this is a good college, but for the placement, it is not.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is good for low budget students as well as looking for scholarship opportunity.

content.Placements: Percentage of placement is very less like 2/40. Some paid and some unpaid internships are offered. No big companies or MNCs are represented in this college. The startup company's approach is good, and they took some students.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is fine and available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, conference hall, playground, park, etc. There is a hostel but none of the students stay there and take a PG or room near the college. Canteen is there. Medical facilities are there. Sports and games can be played on the ground attached to the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good facilities and with good teachers.

content.Placements: The highest CTC was Rs 16 Lacs and the lowest package was Rs 3 lacs. Google, Wipro, etc., visited for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good with the best facilities. The campus contains Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. I know there is not a specific hostel for the girls and boys of college but in my opinion, you will get college outside of the campus very easily and with good mess and canteen with medical facilities sports and games.
content.Faculty: Every teacher is knowledgeable with good qualifications. Their teaching quality is also good. I think so if they work hard and study hard. It depends upon the student who is preparing for his/ her work.

reviews.review_heading: Our college facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were very good. The college had state-of-the-art infrastructure, with campus Wi-Fi, upgraded laboratories, digital classrooms, and deluxe hostels. The college is located in a serene environment with wonderful scenery. It also had excellent sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: For obtaining degree this is a very good college but for the placements and knowledge it is not.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. In the summertime. It is very difficult to study in the class because the fans in the classrooms sound very much. No one would be able to hear the lecture if he/she is sitting on the benches after the third bench. The college campus also seems to be very small. There is no Wi-Fi facility for the students. It also has an average lab with a dual-core or Pentium processor with Windows XP or Windows 7 as the operating systems. There will also be no medic...

reviews.review_heading: It is good for low budget students as well as looking for scholarship opportunity.
reviews.review_text: Everything is fine and available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, conference hall, playground, park, etc. There is a hostel but none of the students stay there and take a PG or room near the college. Canteen is there. Medical facilities are there. Sports and games can be played on the ground attached to the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good facilities and with good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good with the best facilities. The campus contains Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. I know there is not a specific hostel for the girls and boys of college but in my opinion, you will get college outside of the campus very easily and with good mess and canteen with medical facilities sports and games.

highlights.summary: The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Annai College of Engineering and Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

faqs.answer:
A:    Annai College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.
